task_completion.description: Verify that the Juris-M application is open and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Juris-M application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct case entry is selected in the library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The entry for 'Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District' (or 'Tinker') is highlighted/selected in the central library list pane of Juris-M.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Date Decided' field is visible in the right-hand metadata pane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right-hand pane displays the metadata for the selected case, and the 'Date Decided' field is clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Date Decided' field has been updated to the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the 'Date Decided' field in the metadata pane reads exactly 'February 24, 1969'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Extra' field is visible in the right-hand metadata pane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Extra' field is visible in the right-hand metadata pane (the user may need to scroll down to see it).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Extra' field has been updated to include the correct docket number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the 'Extra' field in the metadata pane contains 'Docket No. 21'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Juris-M graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M interface being interacted with (e.g., cursor clicking fields, typing in the metadata pane), rather than terminal commands modifying a database directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the edits were made inside the actual Juris-M application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should clearly be Juris-M (look for the Juris-M/Zotero layout, icons, and menus), not a generic text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Verify that other metadata fields for the case were not improperly deleted or modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other visible fields in the metadata pane (such as Court, Reporter Volume, First Page) should still contain their original data and not be blanked out or overwritten with garbage text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target case name: 'Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District' (may appear as 'Tinker'). Target Date Decided: 'February 24, 1969'. Target Extra field: 'Docket No. 21'. Other case details (Court: United States Supreme Court, Reporter Volume: 393, First Page: 503) should remain unchanged.
